ability-shield.name: Ability Shield
ability-shield.effect: An item to be held by a Pokemon. This cute and rather unique-looking shield protects the holder from having its Ability changed by others.

absorb-bulb.name: Absorb Bulb
absorb-bulb.effect: An item to be held by a Pokemon. This single-use bulb boosts the Sp. Atk stat if the holder is damaged by a Water-type attack.

adamant-crystal.name: Adamant Crystal
adamant-crystal.effect: An item to be held by Dialga. This large, glowing gem wells with power and allows the Pokemon to change form.

adamant-orb.name: Adamant Orb
adamant-orb.effect: A brightly shining gem to be held by Dialga. It boosts the power of Dialga's Dragon- and Steel-type moves.

air-balloon.name: Air Balloon
air-balloon.effect: An item to be held by a Pokemon. This balloon makes the holder float in the air. If the holder is hit with an attack, the balloon will burst.

aloraichium-z.name: Aloraichium Z
aloraichium-z.effect: It converts Z-Power into crystals that upgrade Alolan Raichu's Thunderbolt to a Z-Move.

assault-vest.name: Assault Vest
assault-vest.effect: An item to be held by a Pokemon. This offensive vest boosts the holder's Sp. Def stat but prevents the use of status moves.

big-root.name: Big Root
big-root.effect: An item to be held by a Pokemon. This root boosts the amount of HP the holder restores to itself when it uses HP-stealing moves.

binding-band.name: Binding Band
binding-band.effect: An item to be held by a Pokemon. This band boosts the power of binding moves used by the holder.

black-belt.name: Black Belt
black-belt.effect: An item to be held by a Pokemon. This belt helps with focus and boosts the power of the holder's Fighting-type moves.

black-glasses.name: Black Glasses
black-glasses.effect: An item to be held by a Pokemon. It's a pair of shady- looking glasses that boost the power of the holder's Dark-type moves.

black-sludge.name: Black Sludge
black-sludge.effect: An item to be held by a Pokemon. If the holder is a Poison type, this sludge will gradually restore its HP. It damages any other type.

blue-orb.name: Blue Orb
blue-orb.effect: A shiny blue orb that is said to have a deep connection to a legend of the Hoenn region.

blunder-policy.name: Blunder Policy
blunder-policy.effect: An item to be held by a Pokemon. If the holder misses with a move due to low accuracy, this policy will sharply boost its Speed stat.

booster-energy.name: Booster Energy
booster-energy.effect: An item to be held by Pokemon with certain Abilities. The energy that fills this capsule boosts the strength of the Pokemon.

bright-powder.name: Bright Powder
bright-powder.effect: An item to be held by a Pokemon. This glittery powder casts a tricky glare that lowers the accuracy of opposing Pokemon's moves.

bug-gem.name: Bug Gem
bug-gem.effect: An item to be held by a Pokemon. This gem is imbued with the essence of bugs and will boost the power of a Bug-type move�but only once.

bug-memory.name: Bug Memory
bug-memory.effect: A memory disc that contains Bug-type data. It changes the type of the holder if held by a certain species of Pokemon.

buginium-z.name: Buginium Z
buginium-z.effect: It converts Z-Power into crystals that upgrade Bug-type moves to Bug-type Z-Moves.

burn-drive.name: Burn Drive
burn-drive.effect: A cassette to be held by Genesect. It changes Genesect's Techno Blast move so it becomes Fire type.

cell-battery.name: Cell Battery
cell-battery.effect: An item to be held by a Pokemon. This single-use battery boosts the Attack stat if the holder is damaged by an Electric-type attack.

charcoal.name: Charcoal
charcoal.effect: An item to be held by a Pokemon. It's a combustible fuel that boosts the power of the holder's Fire-type moves.

chill-drive.name: Chill Drive
chill-drive.effect: A cassette to be held by Genesect. It changes Genesect's Techno Blast move so it becomes Ice type.

choice-band.name: Choice Band
choice-band.effect: An item to be held by a Pokemon. This curious headband boosts the holder's Attack stat but only allows the use of a single move.

choice-scarf.name: Choice Scarf
choice-scarf.effect: An item to be held by a Pokemon. This curious scarf boosts the holder's Speed stat but only allows the use of a single move.

choice-specs.name: Choice Specs
choice-specs.effect: An item to be held by a Pokemon. These curious glasses boost the holder's Sp. Atk stat but only allow the use of a single move.

clear-amulet.name: Clear Amulet
clear-amulet.effect: An item to be held by a Pokemon. This clear, sparkling amulet protects the holder from having its stats lowered by moves used against it or by other Pokemon's Abilities.

cornerstone-mask.name: Cornerstone Mask
cornerstone-mask.effect: An item to be held by Ogerpon. This carved wooden mask is adorned with crystals and allows Ogerpon to wield the Rock type during battle.

covert-cloak.name: Covert Cloak
covert-cloak.effect: An item to be held by a Pokemon. This hooded cloak conceals the holder, tricking the eyes of its enemies and protecting it from the additional effects of moves.

damp-rock.name: Damp Rock
damp-rock.effect: An item to be held by a Pokemon. When the holder changes the weather to rain, the rain will persist for longer than usual.

dark-gem.name: Dark Gem
dark-gem.effect: An item to be held by a Pokemon. This gem is imbued with the essence of darkness and will boost the power of a Dark-type move�but only once.

dark-memory.name: Dark Memory
dark-memory.effect: A memory disc that contains Dark-type data. It changes the type of the holder if held by a certain species of Pokemon.

darkinium-z.name: Darkinium Z
darkinium-z.effect: It converts Z-Power into crystals that upgrade Dark-type moves to Dark-type Z-Moves.

decidium-z.name: Decidium Z
decidium-z.effect: It converts Z-Power into crystals that upgrade Decidueye's Spirit Shackle to a Z-Move.

deep-sea-scale.name: Deep Sea Scale
deep-sea-scale.effect: An item to be held by Clamperl. This scale shines with a faint pink and boosts Clamperl's Sp. Def stat.

deep-sea-tooth.name: Deep Sea Tooth
deep-sea-tooth.effect: An item to be held by Clamperl. This fang gleams a sharp silver and boosts Clamperl's Sp. Atk stat.

destiny-knot.name: Destiny Knot
destiny-knot.effect: An item to be held by a Pokemon. Should the holder of this bright-red thread become infatuated, the Pokemon it is infatuated with will be similarly afflicted.

douse-drive.name: Douse Drive
douse-drive.effect: A cassette to be held by Genesect. It changes Genesect's Techno Blast move so it becomes Water type.

draco-plate.name: Draco Plate
draco-plate.effect: An item to be held by a Pokemon. This stone tablet is imbued with the essence of dragons and boosts the power of the holder's Dragon-type moves.

dragon-fang.name: Dragon Fang
dragon-fang.effect: An item to be held by a Pokemon. This hard, sharp fang boosts the power of the holder's Dragon-type moves.

dragon-gem.name: Dragon Gem
dragon-gem.effect: An item to be held by a Pokemon. This gem is imbued with the essence of dragons and will boost the power of a Dragon-type move�but only once.

dragon-memory.name: Dragon Memory
dragon-memory.effect: A memory disc that contains Dragon-type data. It changes the type of the holder if held by a certain species of Pokemon.

dragonium-z.name: Dragonium Z
dragonium-z.effect: It converts Z-Power into crystals that upgrade Dragon-type moves to Dragon-type Z-Moves.

dread-plate.name: Dread Plate
dread-plate.effect: An item to be held by a Pokemon. This stone tablet is imbued with the essence of darkness and boosts the power of the holder's Dark-type moves.

earth-plate.name: Earth Plate
earth-plate.effect: An item to be held by a Pokemon. This stone tablet is imbued with the essence of the earth and boosts the power of the holder's Ground-type moves.

eevium-z.name: Eevium Z
eevium-z.effect: It converts Z-Power into crystals that upgrade Eevee's Last Resort to a Z-Move.

eject-button.name: Eject Button
eject-button.effect: An item to be held by a Pokemon. If the holder is damaged by an attack, it will be switched out of battle to be replaced by another Pokemon on your team.

eject-pack.name: Eject Pack
eject-pack.effect: An item to be held by a Pokemon. If the holder's stats are lowered, it will be switched out of battle.

electric-gem.name: Electric Gem
electric-gem.effect: An item to be held by a Pokemon. This gem is imbued with the essence of electricity and will boost the power of an Electric-type move�but only once.

electric-memory.name: Electric Memory
electric-memory.effect: A memory disc that contains Electric-type data. It changes the type of the holder if held by a certain species of Pokemon.

electric-seed.name: Electric Seed
electric-seed.effect: An item to be held by a Pokemon. If the terrain becomes Electric Terrain, the holder will use this seed to boost its own Defense stat.

electrium-z.name: Electrium Z
electrium-z.effect: It converts Z-Power into crystals that upgrade Electric-type moves to Electric-type Z-Moves.

everstone.name: Everstone
everstone.effect: An item to be held by a Pokemon. A Pokemon holding this peculiar stone is prevented from evolving.

eviolite.name: Eviolite
eviolite.effect: An item to be held by a Pokemon. This mysterious evolutionary lump boosts the Defense and Sp. Def stats when held by a Pokemon that can still evolve.

expert-belt.name: Expert Belt
expert-belt.effect: An item to be held by a Pokemon. It's a well-worn belt that slightly boosts the power of the holder's supereffective moves.

fairium-z.name: Fairium Z
fairium-z.effect: It converts Z-Power into crystals that upgrade Fairy-type moves to Fairy-type Z-Moves.

fairy-feather.name: Fairy Feather
fairy-feather.effect: An item to be held by a Pokemon. This feather, which gleams faintly when hit by light, boosts the power of the holder's Fairy-type moves.

fairy-gem.name: Fairy Gem
fairy-gem.effect: An item to be held by a Pokemon. This gem is imbued with the essence of fairies and will boost the power of a Fairy-type move�but only once.

fairy-memory.name: Fairy Memory
fairy-memory.effect: A memory disc that contains Fairy-type data. It changes the type of the holder if held by a certain species of Pokemon.

fighting-gem.name: Fighting Gem
fighting-gem.effect: An item to be held by a Pokemon. This gem is imbued with the essence of the fighting spirit and will boost the power of a Fighting-type move�but only once.

fighting-memory.name: Fighting Memory
fighting-memory.effect: A memory disc that contains Fighting-type data. It changes the type of the holder if held by a certain species of Pokemon.

fightinium-z.name: Fightinium Z
fightinium-z.effect: It converts Z-Power into crystals that upgrade Fighting-type moves to Fighting-type Z-Moves.

fire-gem.name: Fire Gem
fire-gem.effect: An item to be held by a Pokemon. This gem is imbued with the essence of fire and will boost the power of a Fire-type move�but only once.

fire-memory.name: Fire Memory
fire-memory.effect: A memory disc that contains Fire-type data. It changes the type of the holder if held by a certain species of Pokemon.

firium-z.name: Firium Z
firium-z.effect: It converts Z-Power into crystals that upgrade Fire-type moves to Fire-type Z-Moves.

fist-plate.name: Fist Plate
fist-plate.effect: An item to be held by a Pokemon. This stone tablet is imbued with the essence of the fighting spirit and boosts the power of the holder's Fighting-type moves.

flame-orb.name: Flame Orb
flame-orb.effect: An item to be held by a Pokemon. It's a bizarre orb that gives off heat when touched and will afflict the holder with a burn during battle.

flame-plate.name: Flame Plate
flame-plate.effect: An item to be held by a Pokemon. This stone tablet is imbued with the essence of fire and boosts the power of the holder's Fire-type moves.

float-stone.name: Float Stone
float-stone.effect: An item to be held by a Pokemon. This very light stone reduces the weight of the holder.

flying-gem.name: Flying Gem
flying-gem.effect: An item to be held by a Pokemon. This gem is imbued with the essence of flight and will boost the power of a Flying-type move�but only once.

flying-memory.name: Flying Memory
flying-memory.effect: A memory disc that contains Flying-type data. It changes the type of the holder if held by a certain species of Pokemon.

flyinium-z.name: Flyinium Z
flyinium-z.effect: It converts Z-Power into crystals that upgrade Flying-type moves to Flying-type Z-Moves.

focus-band.name: Focus Band
focus-band.effect: An item to be held by a Pokemon. When the holder is hit with a move that should knock it out, it may be able to endure with 1 HP.

focus-sash.name: Focus Sash
focus-sash.effect: An item to be held by a Pokemon. If the holder has full HP and it is hit with a move that should knock it out, it will endure with 1 HP�but only once.

full-incense.name: Full Incense
full-incense.effect: An item to be held by a Pokemon. This incense has a curious aroma that makes the holder move slower than usual.

ghost-gem.name: Ghost Gem
ghost-gem.effect: An item to be held by a Pokemon. This gem is imbued with the essence of ghosts and will boost the power of a Ghost-type move�but only once.

ghost-memory.name: Ghost Memory
ghost-memory.effect: A memory disc that contains Ghost-type data. It changes the type of the holder if held by a certain species of Pokemon.

ghostium-z.name: Ghostium Z
ghostium-z.effect: It converts Z-Power into crystals that upgrade Ghost-type moves to Ghost-type Z-Moves.

grass-gem.name: Grass Gem
grass-gem.effect: An item to be held by a Pokemon. This gem is imbued with the essence of plants and will boost the power of a Grass-type move�but only once.

grass-memory.name: Grass Memory
grass-memory.effect: A memory disc that contains Grass-type data. It changes the type of the holder if held by a certain species of Pokemon.

grassium-z.name: Grassium Z
grassium-z.effect: It converts Z-Power into crystals that upgrade Grass-type moves to Grass-type Z-Moves.

grassy-seed.name: Grassy Seed
grassy-seed.effect: An item to be held by a Pokemon. If the terrain becomes Grassy Terrain, the holder will use this seed to boost its own Defense stat.

grip-claw.name: Grip Claw
grip-claw.effect: An item to be held by a Pokemon. When the holder uses moves that deal damage over several turns, such as Bind or Wrap, their effects will last longer than usual.

griseous-core.name: Griseous Core
griseous-core.effect: An item to be held by Giratina. This large, glowing gem wells with power and allows the Pokemon to change form.

griseous-orb.name: Griseous Orb
griseous-orb.effect: A shining gem to be held by Giratina. It boosts the power of Giratina's Dragon- and Ghost-type moves.

ground-gem.name: Ground Gem
ground-gem.effect: An item to be held by a Pokemon. This gem is imbued with the essence of the earth and will boost the power of a Ground-type move�but only once.

ground-memory.name: Ground Memory
ground-memory.effect: A memory disc that contains Ground-type data. It changes the type of the holder if held by a certain species of Pokemon.

groundium-z.name: Groundium Z
groundium-z.effect: It converts Z-Power into crystals that upgrade Ground-type moves to Ground-type Z-Moves.

hard-stone.name: Hard Stone
hard-stone.effect: An item to be held by a Pokemon. It's a durable stone that boosts the power of the holder's Rock-type moves.

hearthflame-mask.name: Hearthflame Mask
hearthflame-mask.effect: An item to be held by Ogerpon. This carved wooden mask is adorned with crystals and allows Ogerpon to wield the Fire type during battle.

heat-rock.name: Heat Rock
heat-rock.effect: An item to be held by a Pokemon. When the holder changes the weather to harsh sunlight, the sunlight will persist for longer than usual.

heavy-duty-boots.name: Heavy-Duty Boots
heavy-duty-boots.effect: An item to be held by a Pokemon. These boots protect the holder from the effects of traps and the like set on the battlefield.

ice-gem.name: Ice Gem
ice-gem.effect: An item to be held by a Pokemon. This gem is imbued with the essence of ice and will boost the power of an Ice-type move�but only once.

ice-memory.name: Ice Memory
ice-memory.effect: A memory disc that contains Ice-type data. It changes the type of the holder if held by a certain species of Pokemon.

icicle-plate.name: Icicle Plate
icicle-plate.effect: An item to be held by a Pokemon. This stone tablet is imbued with the essence of ice and boosts the power of the holder's Ice-type moves.

icium-z.name: Icium Z
icium-z.effect: It converts Z-Power into crystals that upgrade Ice-type moves to Ice-type Z-Moves.

icy-rock.name: Icy Rock
icy-rock.effect: An item to be held by a Pokemon. When the holder changes the weather to snow, the snow will persist for longer than usual.

incinium-z.name: Incinium Z
incinium-z.effect: It converts Z-Power into crystals that upgrade Incineroar's Darkest Lariat to a Z-Move.

insect-plate.name: Insect Plate
insect-plate.effect: An item to be held by a Pokemon. This stone tablet is imbued with the essence of bugs and boosts the power of the holder's Bug-type moves.

iron-ball.name: Iron Ball
iron-ball.effect: An item to be held by a Pokemon. It lowers the holder's Speed stat and makes the holder vulnerable to Ground- type moves even if it is a Flying type or is levitating.

iron-plate.name: Iron Plate
iron-plate.effect: An item to be held by a Pokemon. This stone tablet is imbued with the essence of steel and boosts the power of the holder's Steel-type moves.

king's-rock.name: King's Rock
king's-rock.effect: An item to be held by a Pokemon. It may cause the target to flinch whenever the holder successfully inflicts damage on them with an attack.

kommonium-z.name: Kommonium Z
kommonium-z.effect: It converts Z-Power into crystals that upgrade Kommo-o's Clanging Scales to a Z-Move.

lagging-tail.name: Lagging Tail
lagging-tail.effect: An item to be held by a Pokemon. A tail of something, this item is tremendously heavy and makes the holder move slower than usual.

lax-incense.name: Lax Incense
lax-incense.effect: An item to be held by a Pokemon. The curious aroma of this incense may cause moves to miss its holder.

leek.name: Leek
leek.effect: An item to be held by Farfetch'd or Sirfetch'd. This very long and stiff stalk of leek boosts the critical-hit ratio of their moves.

leftovers.name: Leftovers
leftovers.effect: An item to be held by a Pokemon. It slowly but steadily restores the holder's HP.

life-orb.name: Life Orb
life-orb.effect: An item to be held by a Pokemon. It boosts the power of the holder's moves, but the holder also loses a small amount of HP upon landing an attack.

light-ball.name: Light Ball
light-ball.effect: An item to be held by Pikachu. It's a mysterious orb that boosts Pikachu's Attack and Sp. Atk stats.

light-clay.name: Light Clay
light-clay.effect: An item to be held by a Pokemon. When the holder uses protective moves like Light Screen or Reflect, their effects will last longer than usual.

loaded-dice.name: Loaded Dice
loaded-dice.effect: An item to be held by a Pokemon. This loaded dice always rolls a good number, and holding one can ensure that the holder's multistrike moves hit more times.

lucky-punch.name: Lucky Punch
lucky-punch.effect: An item to be held by Chansey. This lucky boxing glove boosts the critical-hit ratio of Chansey's moves.

luminous-moss.name: Luminous Moss
luminous-moss.effect: An item to be held by a Pokemon. This single-use luminous moss boosts the Sp. Def stat if the holder is damaged by a Water-type move.

lunalium-z.name: Lunalium Z
lunalium-z.effect: It converts Z-Power into crystals that upgrade Lunala's Moongeist Beam to a Z-Move.

lustrous-globe.name: Lustrous Globe
lustrous-globe.effect: An item to be held by Palkia. This large, glowing orb wells with power and allows the Pokemon to change form.

lustrous-orb.name: Lustrous Orb
lustrous-orb.effect: A beautifully shining gem to be held by Palkia. It boosts the power of Palkia's Dragon- and Water-type moves.

lycanium-z.name: Lycanium Z
lycanium-z.effect: It converts Z-Power into crystals that upgrade Lycanroc's Stone Edge to a Z-Move.

macho-brace.name: Macho Brace
macho-brace.effect: An item to be held by a Pokemon. Holding this stiff, heavy brace reduces a Pokemon's Speed in battle but allows its stats to grow more quickly.

magnet.name: Magnet
magnet.effect: An item to be held by a Pokemon. It's a powerful magnet that boosts the power of the holder's Electric-type moves.

marshadium-z.name: Marshadium Z
marshadium-z.effect: It converts Z-Power into crystals that upgrade Marshadow's Spectral Thief to a Z-Move.

meadow-plate.name: Meadow Plate
meadow-plate.effect: An item to be held by a Pokemon. This stone tablet is imbued with the essence of plants and boosts the power of the holder's Grass-type moves.

mental-herb.name: Mental Herb
mental-herb.effect: An item to be held by a Pokemon. The holder will be able to shake off move-binding effects to move freely� but only once.

metal-coat.name: Metal Coat
metal-coat.effect: An item to be held by a Pokemon. It's a special metallic coating that boosts the power of the holder's Steel-type moves.

metal-powder.name: Metal Powder
metal-powder.effect: An item to be held by Ditto. Extremely fine yet hard, this odd powder boosts Ditto's Defense stat.

metronome.name: Metronome
metronome.effect: An item to be held by a Pokemon. It boosts the power of a move that's used repeatedly. Once the chain is broken, the move's power returns to normal.

mewnium-z.name: Mewnium Z
mewnium-z.effect: It converts Z-Power into crystals that upgrade Mew's Psychic to a Z-Move.

mimikium-z.name: Mimikium Z
mimikium-z.effect: It converts Z-Power into crystals that upgrade Mimikyu's Play Rough to a Z-Move.

mind-plate.name: Mind Plate
mind-plate.effect: An item to be held by a Pokemon. This stone tablet is imbued with the essence of psychic energy and boosts the power of the holder's Psychic-type moves.

miracle-seed.name: Miracle Seed
miracle-seed.effect: An item to be held by a Pokemon. It's a seed imbued with life force that boosts the power of the holder's Grass-type moves.

mirror-herb.name: Mirror Herb
mirror-herb.effect: An item to be held by a Pokemon. This herb will allow the holder to mirror an opponent's stat increases to boost its own stats�but only once.

misty-seed.name: Misty Seed
misty-seed.effect: An item to be held by a Pokemon. If the terrain becomes Misty Terrain, the holder will use this seed to boost its own Sp. Def stat.

muscle-band.name: Muscle Band
muscle-band.effect: An item to be held by a Pokemon. This headband exudes strength, slightly boosting the power of the holder's physical moves.

mystic-water.name: Mystic Water
mystic-water.effect: An item to be held by a Pokemon. This teardrop-shaped gem boosts the power of the holder's Water-type moves.

never-melt-ice.name: Never-Melt Ice
never-melt-ice.effect: An item to be held by a Pokemon. It's a heat-repelling piece of ice that boosts the power of the holder's Ice- type moves.

normal-gem.name: Normal Gem
normal-gem.effect: An item to be held by a Pokemon. This gem is imbued with the essence of normalcy and will boost the power of a Normal-type move�but only once.

normalium-z.name: Normalium Z
normalium-z.effect: It converts Z-Power into crystals that upgrade Normal-type moves to Normal-type Z-Moves.

odd-incense.name: Odd Incense
odd-incense.effect: An item to be held by a Pokemon. This incense has a curious aroma that boosts the power of the holder's Psychic-type moves.

pikanium-z.name: Pikanium Z
pikanium-z.effect: It converts Z-Power into crystals that upgrade Pikachu's Volt Tackle to a Z-Move.

pikashunium-z.name: Pikashunium Z
pikashunium-z.effect: This is a crystallized form of Z-Power. It upgrades Thunderbolt to a Z-Move when used by a Pikachu wearing a cap.

pixie-plate.name: Pixie Plate
pixie-plate.effect: An item to be held by a Pokemon. This stone tablet is imbued with the essence of fairies and boosts the power of the holder's Fairy-type moves.

poison-barb.name: Poison Barb
poison-barb.effect: An item to be held by a Pokemon. This small poisonous barb boosts the power of the holder's Poison-type moves.

poison-gem.name: Poison Gem
poison-gem.effect: An item to be held by a Pokemon. This gem is imbued with the essence of poison and will boost the power of a Poison-type move�but only once.

poison-memory.name: Poison Memory
poison-memory.effect: A memory disc that contains Poison-type data. It changes the type of the holder if held by a certain species of Pokemon.

poisonium-z.name: Poisonium Z
poisonium-z.effect: It converts Z-Power into crystals that upgrade Poison-type moves to Poison-type Z-Moves.

power-anklet.name: Power Anklet
power-anklet.effect: An item to be held by a Pokemon. This anklet reduces a Pokemon's Speed in battle but allows its Speed stat to grow more quickly.

power-band.name: Power Band
power-band.effect: An item to be held by a Pokemon. This band reduces a Pokemon's Speed in battle but allows its Sp. Def stat to grow more quickly.

power-belt.name: Power Belt
power-belt.effect: An item to be held by a Pokemon. This belt reduces a Pokemon's Speed in battle but allows its Defense stat to grow more quickly.

power-bracer.name: Power Bracer
power-bracer.effect: An item to be held by a Pokemon. This bracer reduces a Pokemon's Speed in battle but allows its Attack stat to grow more quickly.

power-herb.name: Power Herb
power-herb.effect: An item to be held by a Pokemon. It allows the holder to immediately use a move that normally requires a turn to charge�but only once.

power-lens.name: Power Lens
power-lens.effect: An item to be held by a Pokemon. This lens reduces a Pokemon's Speed in battle but allows its Sp. Atk stat to grow more quickly.

power-weight.name: Power Weight
power-weight.effect: An item to be held by a Pokemon. This weight reduces a Pokemon's Speed in battle but allows its HP stat to grow more quickly.

primarium-z.name: Primarium Z
primarium-z.effect: It converts Z-Power into crystals that upgrade Primarina's Sparkling Aria to a Z-Move.

protective-pads.name: Protective Pads
protective-pads.effect: An item to be held by a Pokemon. These pads protect the holder from effects triggered by making direct contact with another Pokemon.

psychic-gem.name: Psychic Gem
psychic-gem.effect: An item to be held by a Pokemon. This gem is imbued with the essence of psychic energy and will boost the power of a Psychic-type move�but only once.

psychic-memory.name: Psychic Memory
psychic-memory.effect: A memory disc that contains Psychic-type data. It changes the type of the holder if held by a certain species of Pokemon.

psychic-seed.name: Psychic Seed
psychic-seed.effect: An item to be held by a Pokemon. If the terrain becomes Psychic Terrain, the holder will use this seed to boost its own Sp. Def stat.

psychium-z.name: Psychium Z
psychium-z.effect: It converts Z-Power into crystals that upgrade Psychic-type moves to Psychic-type Z-Moves.

punching-glove.name: Punching Glove
punching-glove.effect: An item to be held by a Pokemon. This protective glove boosts the power of the holder's punching moves and prevents direct contact with targets.

quick-claw.name: Quick Claw
quick-claw.effect: An item to be held by a Pokemon. This light, sharp claw lets the holder occasionally unleash a move faster than it usually would.

quick-powder.name: Quick Powder
quick-powder.effect: An item to be held by Ditto. Extremely fine yet hard, this odd powder boosts Ditto's Speed stat.

razor-claw.name: Razor Claw
razor-claw.effect: An item to be held by a Pokemon. This sharply hooked claw boosts the critical-hit ratio of the holder's moves.

razor-fang.name: Razor Fang
razor-fang.effect: An item to be held by a Pokemon. This sharply hooked fang may cause the target to flinch whenever the holder successfully inflicts damage on them with an attack.

reaper-cloth.name: Reaper Cloth
reaper-cloth.effect: A cloth imbued with horrifyingly strong spiritual energy. It's loved by a certain Pokemon.

red-card.name: Red Card
red-card.effect: An item to be held by a Pokemon. If the holder is damaged by an attack, the mysterious power of this card can remove the attacker from the battle.

red-orb.name: Red Orb
red-orb.effect: A shiny red orb that is said to have a deep connection to a legend of the Hoenn region.

ring-target.name: Ring Target
ring-target.effect: An item to be held by a Pokemon. Moves that would normally have no effect due to type matchups will still hit the holder.

rock-gem.name: Rock Gem
rock-gem.effect: An item to be held by a Pokemon. This gem is imbued with the essence of rock and will boost the power of a Rock-type move�but only once.

rock-incense.name: Rock Incense
rock-incense.effect: An item to be held by a Pokemon. This incense has a curious aroma that boosts the power of the holder's Rock-type moves.

rock-memory.name: Rock Memory
rock-memory.effect: A memory disc that contains Rock-type data. It changes the type of the holder if held by a certain species of Pokemon.

rockium-z.name: Rockium Z
rockium-z.effect: It converts Z-Power into crystals that upgrade Rock-type moves to Rock-type Z-Moves.

rocky-helmet.name: Rocky Helmet
rocky-helmet.effect: An item to be held by a Pokemon. This helmet damages any attacker that makes direct contact with the holder.

room-service.name: Room Service
room-service.effect: An item to be held by a Pokemon. If Trick Room takes effect, this item will lower the holder's Speed stat.

rose-incense.name: Rose Incense
rose-incense.effect: An item to be held by a Pokemon. This incense has a curious aroma that boosts the power of the holder's Grass-type moves.

rusted-shield.name: Rusted Shield
rusted-shield.effect: It is said that a hero used this shield to halt a terrible disaster in ancient times. But it's grown rusty and worn.

rusted-sword.name: Rusted Sword
rusted-sword.effect: It is said that a hero used this sword to halt a terrible disaster in ancient times. But it's grown rusty and worn.

safety-goggles.name: Safety Goggles
safety-goggles.effect: An item to be held by a Pokemon. These goggles protect the holder from both sandstorm damage and the effects of powders and spores.

scope-lens.name: Scope Lens
scope-lens.effect: An item to be held by a Pokemon. It's a lens for scoping out weak points. It boosts the holder's critical-hit ratio.

sea-incense.name: Sea Incense
sea-incense.effect: An item to be held by a Pokemon. This incense has a curious aroma that boosts the power of the holder's Water-type moves.

sharp-beak.name: Sharp Beak
sharp-beak.effect: An item to be held by a Pokemon. It's a long, sharp beak that boosts the power of the holder's Flying-type moves.

shed-shell.name: Shed Shell
shed-shell.effect: An item to be held by a Pokemon. Hard and sturdy, this discarded carapace enables the holder to switch out of battle without fail.

shell-bell.name: Shell Bell
shell-bell.effect: An item to be held by a Pokemon. The holder restores a little HP to itself every time it inflicts damage with an attack.

shock-drive.name: Shock Drive
shock-drive.effect: A cassette to be held by Genesect. It changes Genesect's Techno Blast move so it becomes Electric type.

silk-scarf.name: Silk Scarf
silk-scarf.effect: An item to be held by a Pokemon. It's a sumptuous scarf that boosts the power of the holder's Normal-type moves.

silver-powder.name: Silver Powder
silver-powder.effect: An item to be held by a Pokemon. It's a shiny silver powder that boosts the power of the holder's Bug-type moves.

sky-plate.name: Sky Plate
sky-plate.effect: An item to be held by a Pokemon. This stone tablet is imbued with the essence of flight and boosts the power of the holder's Flying-type moves.

smooth-rock.name: Smooth Rock
smooth-rock.effect: An item to be held by a Pokemon. When the holder changes the weather to a sandstorm, the storm will persist for longer than usual.

snorlium-z.name: Snorlium Z
snorlium-z.effect: It converts Z-Power into crystals that upgrade Snorlax's Giga Impact to a Z-Move.

snowball.name: Snowball
snowball.effect: An item to be held by a Pokemon. This single-use ball of snow boosts the Attack stat if the holder is damaged by an Ice-type move.

soft-sand.name: Soft Sand
soft-sand.effect: An item to be held by a Pokemon. This loose, silky sand boosts the power of the holder's Ground-type moves.

solganium-z.name: Solganium Z
solganium-z.effect: It converts Z-Power into crystals that upgrade Solgaleo's Sunsteel Strike to a Z-Move.

soothe-bell.name: Soothe Bell
soothe-bell.effect: An item to be held by a Pokemon. The comforting chime of this bell calms the holder, making it friendly.

soul-dew.name: Soul Dew
soul-dew.effect: A wondrous orb to be held by Latios or Latias. It boosts the power of their Psychic- and Dragon-type moves.

spell-tag.name: Spell Tag
spell-tag.effect: An item to be held by a Pokemon. It's a sinister, eerie tag that boosts the power of the holder's Ghost-type moves.

splash-plate.name: Splash Plate
splash-plate.effect: An item to be held by a Pokemon. This stone tablet is imbued with the essence of water and boosts the power of the holder's Water-type moves.

spooky-plate.name: Spooky Plate
spooky-plate.effect: An item to be held by a Pokemon. This stone tablet is imbued with the essence of ghosts and boosts the power of the holder's Ghost-type moves.

steel-gem.name: Steel Gem
steel-gem.effect: An item to be held by a Pokemon. This gem is imbued with the essence of steel and will boost the power of a Steel-type move�but only once.

steel-memory.name: Steel Memory
steel-memory.effect: A memory disc that contains Steel-type data. It changes the type of the holder if held by a certain species of Pokemon.

steelium-z.name: Steelium Z
steelium-z.effect: It converts Z-Power into crystals that upgrade Steel-type moves to Steel-type Z-Moves.

sticky-barb.name: Sticky Barb
sticky-barb.effect: An item to be held by a Pokemon. It damages the holder every turn and may latch on to Pokemon that make direct contact with the holder.

stone-plate.name: Stone Plate
stone-plate.effect: An item to be held by a Pokemon. This stone tablet is imbued with the essence of rock and boosts the power of the holder's Rock-type moves.

tapunium-z.name: Tapunium Z
tapunium-z.effect: It converts Z-Power into crystals that upgrade the tapu's Nature's Madness to a Z-Move.

terrain-extender.name: Terrain Extender
terrain-extender.effect: An item to be held by a Pokemon. It extends the duration of terrain caused by the holder's move or Ability.

thick-club.name: Thick Club
thick-club.effect: An item to be held by Cubone or Marowak. This hard bone of unknown origin boosts their Attack stat.

throat-spray.name: Throat Spray
throat-spray.effect: An item to be held by a Pokemon. If the holder uses a sound-based move, this throat spray will boost its Sp. Atk stat.

toxic-orb.name: Toxic Orb
toxic-orb.effect: An item to be held by a Pokemon. It's a bizarre orb that exudes toxins when touched and will badly poison the holder during battle.

toxic-plate.name: Toxic Plate
toxic-plate.effect: An item to be held by a Pokemon. This stone tablet is imbued with the essence of poison and boosts the power of the holder's Poison-type moves.

twisted-spoon.name: Twisted Spoon
twisted-spoon.effect: An item to be held by a Pokemon. This spoon is imbued with telekinetic energy and boosts the power of the holder's Psychic-type moves.

ultranecrozium-z.name: Ultranecrozium Z
ultranecrozium-z.effect: It's a crystal that turns Necrozma fused with Solgaleo or Lunala into a new form.

utility-umbrella.name: Utility Umbrella
utility-umbrella.effect: An item to be held by a Pokemon. This sturdy umbrella protects the holder from the effects of rain and harsh sunlight.

water-gem.name: Water Gem
water-gem.effect: An item to be held by a Pokemon. This gem is imbued with the essence of water and will boost the power of a Water-type move�but only once.

water-memory.name: Water Memory
water-memory.effect: A memory disc that contains Water-type data. It changes the type of the holder if held by a certain species of Pokemon.

waterium-z.name: Waterium Z
waterium-z.effect: It converts Z-Power into crystals that upgrade Water-type moves to Water-type Z-Moves.

wave-incense.name: Wave Incense
wave-incense.effect: An item to be held by a Pokemon. This incense has a curious aroma that boosts the power of the holder's Water-type moves.

weakness-policy.name: Weakness Policy
weakness-policy.effect: An item to be held by a Pokemon. This policy boosts the holder's Attack and Sp. Atk. stats for a while if the holder is hit with a move it's weak to.

wellspring-mask.name: Wellspring Mask
wellspring-mask.effect: An item to be held by Ogerpon. This carved wooden mask is adorned with crystals and allows Ogerpon to wield the Water type during battle.

white-herb.name: White Herb
white-herb.effect: An item to be held by a Pokemon. It will restore any lowered stat in battle�but only once.

wide-lens.name: Wide Lens
wide-lens.effect: An item to be held by a Pokemon. It's a magnifying lens that slightly boosts the accuracy of the holder's moves.

wise-glasses.name: Wise Glasses
wise-glasses.effect: An item to be held by a Pokemon. This thick pair of glasses slightly boosts the power of the holder's special moves.

zap-plate.name: Zap Plate
zap-plate.effect: An item to be held by a Pokemon. This stone tablet is imbued with the essence of electricity and boosts the power of the holder's Electric-type moves.

zoom-lens.name: Zoom Lens
zoom-lens.effect: An item to be held by a Pokemon. When the holder acts after its target, its move will be more accurate than usual.

auspicious-armor.name: Auspicious Armor
auspicious-armor.effect: A peculiar set of armor that can make a certain species of Pokémon evolve. Auspicious wishes live within it.

berry-sweet.name: Berry Sweet
berry-sweet.effect: A berry-shaped sweet. When a Milcery holds this, it spins around happily.

black-augurite.name: Black Augurite
black-augurite.effect: A glassy black stone that produces a sharp cutting edge when split. It's loved by a certain Pokemon.

chipped-pot.name: Chipped Pot
chipped-pot.effect: A peculiar teapot that can make a certain species of Pokemon evolve. It may be chipped, but tea poured from it is delicious.

clover-sweet.name: Clover Sweet
clover-sweet.effect: A clover-shaped sweet. When a Milcery holds this, it spins around happily.

cracked-pot.name: Cracked Pot
cracked-pot.effect: A peculiar teapot that can make a certain species of Pokemon evolve. It may be cracked, but tea poured from it is delicious.

dawn-stone.name: Dawn Stone
dawn-stone.effect: A peculiar stone that can make certain species of Pokemon evolve. It sparkles like a glittering eye.

dragon-scale.name: Dragon Scale
dragon-scale.effect: A very tough and inflexible scale. Dragon-type Pokemon may be holding this item when caught.

dubious-disc.name: Dubious Disc
dubious-disc.effect: A transparent device overflowing with dubious data. It's loved by a certain Pokemon.

dusk-stone.name: Dusk Stone
dusk-stone.effect: A peculiar stone that can make certain species of Pokemon evolve. It holds dark shadows within it.

electirizer.name: Electirizer
electirizer.effect: A box packed with a tremendous amount of electric energy. It's loved by a certain Pokemon.

fire-stone.name: Fire Stone
fire-stone.effect: A peculiar stone that can make certain species of Pokemon evolve. It has a fiery orange heart.

flower-sweet.name: Flower Sweet
flower-sweet.effect: A flower-shaped sweet. When a Milcery holds this, it spins around happily.

galarica-cuff.name: Galarica Cuff
galarica-cuff.effect: A cuff made from woven-together Galarica Twigs. Giving it to a Galarian Slowpoke makes the Pokemon very happy.

galarica-wreath.name: Galarica Wreath
galarica-wreath.effect: A wreath made from woven-together Galarica Twigs. Placing it on the head of a Galarian Slowpoke makes the Pokemon very happy.

ice-stone.name: Ice Stone
ice-stone.effect: A peculiar stone that can make certain species of Pokemon evolve. It has a snowflake pattern in it.

leader's-crest.name: Leader's Crest
leader's-crest.effect: A shard of what appears to be an old blade of some sort. It is held only by Bisharp that head up a group of Pawniard.

leaf-stone.name: Leaf Stone
leaf-stone.effect: A peculiar stone that can make certain species of Pokemon evolve. It has an unmistakable leaf pattern.

love-sweet.name: Love Sweet
love-sweet.effect: A heart-shaped sweet. When a Milcery holds this, it spins around happily.

magmarizer.name: Magmarizer
magmarizer.effect: A box packed with a tremendous amount of magma energy. It's loved by a certain Pokemon.

malicious-armor.name: Malicious Armor
malicious-armor.effect: A peculiar set of armor that can make a certain species of Pokemon evolve. Malicious will lurks within it.

masterpiece-teacup.name: Masterpiece Teacup
masterpiece-teacup.effect: A peculiar teacup that can make a certain species of Pokemon evolve. It may be chipped, but tea drunk from it is delicious.

metal-alloy.name: Metal Alloy
metal-alloy.effect: A peculiar metal that can make certain species of Pokemon evolve. It is composed of many layers.

moon-stone.name: Moon Stone
moon-stone.effect: A peculiar stone that can make certain species of Pokemon evolve. It is dark like the night sky.

oval-stone.name: Oval Stone
oval-stone.effect: A peculiar stone that can make a certain species of Pokemon evolve. It is round and smooth.

peat-block.name: Peat Block
peat-block.effect: A block of muddy material that can be used as fuel for burning when it is dried. It's loved by a certain Pokemon.

prism-scale.name: Prism Scale
prism-scale.effect: A mysterious scale that causes a certain Pokemon to evolve. It shines with a beautiful iridescence.

protector.name: Protector
protector.effect: A protective item of some sort. It is extremely stiff and heavy. It's loved by a certain Pokemon.

ribbon-sweet.name: Ribbon Sweet
ribbon-sweet.effect: A ribbon-shaped sweet. When a Milcery holds this, it spins around happily.

sachet.name: Sachet
sachet.effect: A sachet filled with fragrant perfumes that are just slightly overwhelming. Yet it's loved by a certain Pokemon.

scroll-of-darkness.name: Scroll of Darkness
scroll-of-darkness.effect: A peculiar scroll that can make a certain species of Pokemon evolve. Written upon it are the true secrets of the path of darkness.

scroll-of-waters.name: Scroll of Waters
scroll-of-waters.effect: A peculiar scroll that can make a certain species of Pokemon evolve. Written upon it are the true secrets of the path of water.

shiny-stone.name: Shiny Stone
shiny-stone.effect: A peculiar stone that can make certain species of Pokemon evolve. It shines with a dazzling light.

star-sweet.name: Star Sweet
star-sweet.effect: A star-shaped sweet. When a Milcery holds this, it spins around happily.

strawberry-sweet.name: Strawberry Sweet
strawberry-sweet.effect: A strawberry-shaped sweet. When a Milcery holds this, it spins around happily.

sun-stone.name: Sun Stone
sun-stone.effect: A peculiar stone that can make certain species of Pokemon evolve. It burns as red as the evening sun.

sweet-apple.name: Sweet Apple
sweet-apple.effect: A peculiar apple that can make a certain species of Pokemon evolve. It's exceptionally sweet.

syrupy-apple.name: Syrupy Apple
syrupy-apple.effect: A peculiar apple that can make a certain species of Pokemon evolve. It's exceptionally syrupy.

tart-apple.name: Tart Apple
tart-apple.effect: A peculiar apple that can make a certain species of Pokemon evolve. It's exceptionally tart.

thunder-stone.name: Thunder Stone
thunder-stone.effect: A peculiar stone that can make certain species of Pokemon evolve. It has a distinct thunderbolt pattern.

unremarkable-teacup.name: Unremarkable Teacup
unremarkable-teacup.effect: A peculiar teacup that can make a certain species of Pokemon evolve. It may be cracked, but tea drunk from it is delicious.

upgrade.name: Upgrade
upgrade.effect: A transparent device somehow filled with all sorts of data. It's loved by a certain Pokemon.

water-stone.name: Water Stone
water-stone.effect: A peculiar stone that can make certain species of Pokemon evolve. It is the clear blue of a deep pool.

whipped-dream.name: Whipped Dream
whipped-dream.effect: A soft and sweet treat made of fluffy, puffy, whipped, and whirled cream. It's loved by a certain Pokemon.

aguav-berry.name: Aguav Berry
aguav-berry.effect: If a Pokemon holds one of these Berries, it will be able to restore some HP should it find itself in a pinch. But it will become confused if it hates the Berry's taste.

apicot-berry.name: Apicot Berry
apicot-berry.effect: If a Pokemon holds one of these Berries, its Sp. Def stat will be boosted should it find itself in a pinch.

aspear-berry.name: Aspear Berry
aspear-berry.effect: If a Pokemon holds one of these Berries, it will be able to thaw itself after being frozen.

babiri-berry.name: Babiri Berry
babiri-berry.effect: If a Pokemon holding this Berry is hit with a supereffective Steel-type move, the power of that move will be weakened.

charti-berry.name: Charti Berry
charti-berry.effect: If a Pokemon holding this Berry is hit with a supereffective Rock-type move, the power of that move will be weakened.

cheri-berry.name: Cheri Berry
cheri-berry.effect: If a Pokemon holds one of these Berries, it will be able to free itself from paralysis.

chesto-berry.name: Chesto Berry
chesto-berry.effect: If a Pokemon holds one of these Berries, it will be able to shake off its drowsiness.

chilan-berry.name: Chilan Berry
chilan-berry.effect: If a Pokemon holding this Berry is hit with a Normal-type move, the power of that move will be weakened.

chople-berry.name: Chople Berry
chople-berry.effect: If a Pokemon holding this Berry is hit with a supereffective Fighting-type move, the power of that move will be weakened.

coba-berry.name: Coba Berry
coba-berry.effect: If a Pokemon holding this Berry is hit with a supereffective Flying-type move, the power of that move will be weakened.

colbur-berry.name: Colbur Berry
colbur-berry.effect: If a Pokemon holding this Berry is hit with a supereffective Dark-type move, the power of that move will be weakened.

custap-berry.name: Custap Berry
custap-berry.effect: If a Pokemon holds one of these Berries, it will be able to act faster should it find itself in a pinch�but only for the next move it uses.

enigma-berry.name: Enigma Berry
enigma-berry.effect: If a Pokemon holds one of these Berries, it will be able to regain some HP if it is hit with a supereffective move.

figy-berry.name: Figy Berry
figy-berry.effect: If a Pokemon holds one of these Berries, it will be able to restore some HP should it find itself in a pinch. But it will become confused if it hates the Berry's taste.

ganlon-berry.name: Ganlon Berry
ganlon-berry.effect: If a Pokemon holds one of these Berries, its Defense stat will be boosted should it find itself in a pinch.

grepa-berry.name: Grepa Berry
grepa-berry.effect: If a Pokemon is fed this Berry, it will grow more friendly, but it will lose base points for its Sp. Def stat.

haban-berry.name: Haban Berry
haban-berry.effect: If a Pokemon holding this Berry is hit with a supereffective Dragon-type move, the power of that move will be weakened.

hondew-berry.effect: If a Pokemon is fed this Berry, it will grow more friendly, but it will lose base points for its Sp. Atk stat.

iapapa-berry.effect: If a Pokemon holds one of these Berries, it will be able to restore some HP should it find itself in a pinch. But it will become confused if it hates the Berry's taste.

jaboca-berry.name: Jaboca Berry
jaboca-berry.effect: If a Pokemon holding this Berry is hit with a physical move, the attacker will also take damage.

kasib-berry.name: Kasib Berry
kasib-berry.effect: If a Pokemon holding this Berry is hit with a supereffective Ghost-type move, the power of that move will be weakened.

kebia-berry.name: Kebia Berry
kebia-berry.effect: If a Pokemon holding this Berry is hit with a supereffective Poison-type move, the power of that move will be weakened.

kee-berry.name: Kee Berry
kee-berry.effect: If a Pokemon holding this Berry is hit with a physical move, the holder's Defense stat will be boosted.

kelpsy-berry.name: Kelpsy Berry
kelpsy-berry.effect: If a Pokemon is fed this Berry, it will grow more friendly, but it will lose base points for its Attack stat.

lansat-berry.name: Lansat Berry
lansat-berry.effect: If a Pokemon holds one of these Berries, its critical-hit ratio will be boosted should it find itself in a pinch.

leppa-berry.name: Leppa Berry
leppa-berry.effect: If a Pokemon holds one of these Berries, it will be able to restore 10 PP to a move.

liechi-berry.name: Liechi Berry
liechi-berry.effect: If a Pokemon holds one of these Berries, its Attack stat will be boosted should it find itself in a pinch.

lum-berry.name: Lum Berry
lum-berry.effect: If a Pokemon holds one of these Berries, it will be able to cure itself of any status condition it may have.

mago-berry.name: Mago Berry
mago-berry.effect: If a Pokemon holds one of these Berries, it will be able to restore some HP should it find itself in a pinch. But it will become confused if it hates the Berry's taste.

maranga-berry.name: Maranga Berry
maranga-berry.effect: If a Pokemon holding this Berry is hit with a special move, the holder's Sp. Def stat will be boosted.

micle-berry.name: Micle Berry
micle-berry.effect: If a Pokemon holds one of these Berries, its accuracy will be boosted should it find itself in a pinch�but only for the next move it uses.

occa-berry.name: Occa Berry
occa-berry.effect: If a Pokemon holding this Berry is hit with a supereffective Fire-type move, the power of that move will be weakened.

oran-berry.name: Oran Berry
oran-berry.effect: If a Pokemon holds one of these Berries, it will be able to restore 10 HP to itself.

passho-berry.name: Passho Berry
passho-berry.effect: If a Pokemon holding this Berry is hit with a supereffective Water-type move, the power of that move will be weakened.

payapa-berry.effect: If a Pokemon holding this Berry is hit with a supereffective Psychic-type move, the power of that move will be weakened.

pecha-berry.name: Pecha Berry
pecha-berry.effect: If a Pokemon holds one of these Berries, it will be able to lift the effects of being poisoned from itself.

persim-berry.name: Persim Berry
persim-berry.effect: If a Pokemon holds one of these Berries, it will be able to cure itself of confusion.

petaya-berry.effect: If a Pokemon holds one of these Berries, its Sp. Atk stat will be boosted should it find itself in a pinch.

pomeg-berry.effect: If a Pokemon is fed this Berry, it will grow more friendly, but it will lose base points for its HP stat.

qualot-berry.effect: If a Pokemon is fed this Berry, it will grow more friendly, but it will lose base points for its Defense stat.

rawst-berry.effect: If a Pokemon holds one of these Berries, it will be able to cure itself of a burn.

rindo-berry.effect: If a Pokemon holding this Berry is hit with a supereffective Grass-type move, the power of that move will be weakened.

roseli-berry.name: Roseli Berry
roseli-berry.effect: If a Pokemon holding this Berry is hit with a supereffective Fairy-type move, the power of that move will be weakened.

rowap-berry.name: Rowap Berry
rowap-berry.effect: If a Pokemon holding this Berry is hit with a special move, the attacker will also take damage.

salac-berry.effect: If a Pokemon holds one of these Berries, its Speed stat will be boosted should it find itself in a pinch.

shuca-berry.effect: If a Pokemon holding this Berry is hit with a supereffective Ground-type move, the power of that move will be weakened.

sitrus-berry.effect: If a Pokemon holds one of these Berries, it will be able to restore a small amount of HP to itself.

starf-berry.name: Starf Berry
starf-berry.effect: If a Pokemon holds one of these Berries, one of its stats will be sharply boosted should it find itself in a pinch.

bottle-cap.effect: A lovely silver bottle cap. Certain people are delighted to be given one of these.

fighting-tera-shard.effect: On rare occasions, these shards form when a Tera Pokemon falls in battle and its Tera Jewel shatters.

fire-tera-shard.effect: On rare occasions, these shards form when a Tera Pokemon falls in battle and its Tera Jewel shatters.

ghost-tera-shard.effect: On rare occasions, these shards form when a Tera Pokemon falls in battle and its Tera Jewel shatters.

gold-bottle-cap.effect: A lovely gold bottle cap, which is even rarer than a regular silver one. Certain people are delighted to be given one of these.
